channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: France opens ‘war crimes’ probe into Israel’s treatment of Gaza activists
item.description: French activists who took part in a Gaza-bound foreign aid flotilla accuse Israeli forces of abuse and torture.

item.title: Families clear rubble after overnight Israeli strikes in Gaza
item.description: Families in Az-Zawayda, central Gaza, clear rubble after overnight Israeli strikes in Gaza

item.title: Anthropic urges AI labs to pause, warns humans risk losing control
item.description: It warned that rapid advances in technology could soon allow AI systems to improve themselves faster than human control.

item.title: Judge strikes down Trump bar on asylum, visa processing for 39 countries
item.description: Judge says restrictions put lives of immigrants in 'indeterminate legal limbo', motivated by 'anti-immigrant sentiment'.

item.title: Is the latest US ceasefire deal for Lebanon meaningless?
item.description: Israel and Hezbollah continue fighting after truce announcement.

item.title: Huge fire erupts at Honda warehouse in Barcelona
item.description: Around 150 workers were evacuated after a fire broke out at a Honda industrial warehouse in Barcelona.

item.title: Trump admin’s cancellation of wind energy projects causes business turmoil
item.description: Seven northeastern states have sued US gov't for paying TotalEnergies to withdraw from offshore wind projects.

item.title: Russia’s Putin says ‘no point’ meeting Ukraine’s Zelenskyy for now
item.description: The Russian leader insisted military action would only stop after Moscow achieves its 'goals'.

item.title: Ukraine and Russia exchange 185 prisoners of war each
item.description: Russia and Ukraine have each released 185 prisoners in a major exchange, which Russia says was mediated by the UAE.

item.title: Video shows moment Israeli air strike hits car in southern Lebanon
item.description: Video shows the moment when journalist Abbas Fakih was reporting in Nabatieh, Lebanon and an Israeli air strike hit.

item.title: Germany’s Merz says EU to initiate integration of Western Balkans
item.description: Alongside Ukraine and Moldova, six Western Balkan nations wish to join the European Union.

item.title: Lawsuit challenges US ‘third-country’ deportations to Equatorial Guinea
item.description: Complaint filed to African Commission on Human and Peoples' Rights challenges controversial expulsion practice.

item.title: An ice cream parlour survives Gaza’s genocide and gives seven students hope
item.description: Gaza medical and dental students sell ice cream in Khan Younis to fund their studies and keep their dreams alive

item.title: Somalia declares order restored after two days of fighting in Mogadishu
item.description: Violence that paralysed two Mogadishu districts subsides, but opposition rejects president's rule and vows to fight on.

item.title: Ballistics Putin’s ‘last argument’ as Ukraine brings his army to standstill
item.description: Russia’s performance since December shows it can contest territory but cannot hold it, say battlefield observers.

item.title: US Senate passes $70bn ICE funding bill: What comes next?
item.description: Republicans pass key Trump initiative after marathon vote-a-rama, avoid barring controversial 'anti-weaponisation' fund.

item.title: Zverev cruises past Mensik to reach second French Open final
item.description: Alexander Zverev will face either Flavio Cobolli or Matteo Arnaldi in final, after beating Jakub Mensik at French Open.

item.title: Ireland imposes travel ban on Israeli ministers Ben-Gvir and Smotrich
item.description: Irish Taoiseach Martin says the ministers have shown 'a desire to see the elimination of Palestinians from Palestine'.

item.title: Why Washington is reducing visa processing across Africa
item.description: US plans to centralise visa processing across Africa could increase cross-border travel for visa applicants.

item.title: Israeli Knesset member backs settlement push in southern Syria
item.description: An Israeli Knesset member has publicly backed efforts to establish Israeli settlements in southern Syria.

item.title: Man City chair Al Mubarak will ‘say everything’ after verdict on finances
item.description: English Premier League side Manchester City charged with 115 alleged breaches of financial rules.

item.title: ‘Red meat is a dream’: Iran inflation hits highest level since World War II
item.description: The war with the US is not the only factor driving prices skywards.

item.title: At least 49 people die of thirst after truck breakdown in Niger desert
item.description: Two people managed to survive after walking more than 50km to a water source and then a nearby town.

item.title: Barcelona teenager Lamine Yamal wins La Liga Player of the Season award
item.description: Lamine Yamal will be an integral part of Spain's World Cup 2026 challenge and was key in Barcelona's La Liga defence.

item.title: WHO, Africa CDC unveil $518m Ebola plan as Uganda death toll rises
item.description: Uganda reported three more cases and one more death from the outbreak which has spread from the DRC.
